app.title: TrailStats
app.disclaimer: TrailStats is not affiliated with or endorsed by Strava, Inc. or Garmin Ltd. "Strava" and "Garmin" are trademarks of their respective owners.

upload.dropzone: Drop your export ZIP here, or click to browse — Strava, Garmin and more

error.invalidZip: This doesn't look like a supported export. Make sure it's the full ZIP you downloaded from Strava, Garmin or another supported platform.
error.noActivities: Couldn't find activities in this export.

upload.discarded: {{count}} rows could not be read and were skipped.

trends.title: Trends
trends.chartAlt: Distance trend chart. Use the button below to view the data as a table.
trends.yearOverYearAlt: Distance comparison between {{current}} and {{previous}}, aligned by period.

breakdown.title: Distance by activity type
breakdown.chartAlt: Donut chart showing the share of total distance per activity type. Use the button below to view the data as a table.

privacy.note: Everything runs in your browser. Your data never leaves this device.
privacy.heading: Your data stays with you

points.local: Your export is read and analyzed entirely inside this browser tab.
points.noServer: Nothing is uploaded — there is no server, no account and no storage of your files.
points.noTracking: No tracking, no cookies, no analytics. We never see your activities.

privacy.verify: Don't take our word for it: open your browser's developer tools, go to the Network tab, and load a file — you'll see no data ever leaves your device.

demo.bannerText: You're exploring TrailStats with fictional sample data. Exit to analyze your own export.
